artifacts.summary: Implementation blocked by temporal coherence sorries in ClosureSaturation.lean (forward_F, backward_P, modal_backward)

review_reason: Task blocked by 4 sorries in upstream infrastructure: timelineQuotFMCS_forward_F, timelineQuotFMCS_backward_P, timelineQuotSingletonBFMCS.modal_backward, and timelineQuot_not_valid_of_neg_consistent. Root cause is temporal coherence gap for FMCS over TimelineQuot.

partial_progress.details: Phase 1 blocked - temporal coherence (forward_F/backward_P) requires witnesses to be in TimelineQuot but Lindenbaum witnesses may not be. The m > 2k case in staged construction is not handled.

resolution_paths: Option A: Complete staged construction for m > 2k case
Option B: Transfer theorem from CanonicalMCS to TimelineQuot
Option C: Use Int-based completeness with embedding
